zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Longchamp Sheriff of Herefordshire於1160年出生時，他的父親Hugh de Longchamp II17歲，母親Emma St Leger18歲。他和Maud Cantilupe至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1212年在英國英格蘭賀福爾維爾頓享年52歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Longchamp Sheriff of Herefordshire于1160年出生时，他的父亲Hugh de Longchamp II17岁，母亲Emma St Leger18岁。他和Maud Cantilupe至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1212年在英国英格兰賀福爾維爾頓享年52岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾維爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Longchamp Sheriff of Herefordshire was born in 1160, his father, Hugh de Longchamp II, was 17 and his mother, Emma St Leger, was 18. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Maud Cantilupe. He died in 1212, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Wilton, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Longchamp Sheriff of Herefordshire est né en 1160, son père, Hugh de Longchamp II, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Emma St Leger, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Maud Cantilupe. Il est décédé en 1212, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Longchamp Sheriff of Herefordshire 1160 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Longchamp II 17 und seine Mutter Emma St Leger 18. Er hatte mit Maud Cantilupe mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1212 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wilton, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Longchamp Sheriff of Herefordshire è nato il nel 1160, il suo padre, Hugh de Longchamp II, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Emma St Leger, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Maud Cantilupe. Morì nel 1212, nel Wilton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Wilton, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Longchamp Sheriff of Herefordshireが1160年に生まれた時，父Hugh de Longchamp IIは17歳，母Emma St Legerは18歳であった。彼はMaud Cantilupeとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1212年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで52歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Longchamp Sheriff of Herefordshire(이)가 1160년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Longchamp II(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma St Leger(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Maud Cantilupe(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1212년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 윌턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Longchamp Sheriff of Herefordshire nasceu em 1160, seu pai, Hugh de Longchamp II, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Emma St Leger, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Maud Cantilupe. Ele faleceu em 1212, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Longchamp Sheriff of Herefordshire родился в 1160 г., его отцу по имени Hugh de Longchamp II было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma St Leger, 18. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Maud Cantilupe. Он умер в 1212 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Longchamp Sheriff of Herefordshire nació en 1160, su papá, Hugh de Longchamp II, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Emma St Leger, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Maud Cantilupe. Murió en 1212, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
